name: Stuffed Cucumber Rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F/200°C.
2. Slice eggplants in half and rub oil lightly over the skin. Place face down on a greased tray and bake for 1 hour.
3. Leave to cool completely. Scoop out the insides and blend with the almonds, onion, garlic, and parsley. Season well and chill thoroughly.
4. Cut cucumber into 8 pieces, each about 1 inch in size. Scoop out the middle of each piece to form a small case, being careful not to cut all the way through. You may leave the cases raw or blanch them in boiling water for 5 minutes.
5. Fill each cucumber chunk with the eggplant pâté.
6. Line a serving platter with lettuce and edge it with tomato slices. Place the cucumber cases in the center and garnish with lemon wedges and parsley sprigs.
